vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely aspirational; the physical reality indicates a state of severe neglect or total senescence. P1 (Yellow Pot) is present but contains no visible foliage. P3 (Black Pot) contains the white rabbit anchor but no viable Pothos foliage. P2/P4 are indistinguishable or absent.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot contains dark, undisturbed soil. No green matter detected.
plant_audit.P3: Black pot contains a white rabbit figurine amidst dark, damp-looking soil. No Pothos foliage present.
plant_audit.General: No viable plant life identified in any container.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, appears consistently damp/saturated across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: White fragments (likely eggshell or perlite) present in P3. A metallic object (spoon) appears in T-3 and T-2, then is removed.
biome_observations.surface: Desk surface is dark and reflective.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: Introduction of a metallic spoon into the yellow pot (P1).
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Spoon remains, soil surface appears unchanged.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Spoon removed. Lighting conditions fluctuate, obscuring detail.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Return to baseline lighting. No biological growth observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. All registered specimens are either dead, removed, or buried. The presence of a white rabbit anchor without a host plant suggests a decorative setup rather than an active botanical environment.
anomalies: Presence of a spoon (T-3, T-2) suggesting human intervention/maintenance attempt.
Total absence of expected foliage in all pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete lack of living botanical specimens. The pots serve as containers for soil and decorative elements (rabbit figurine, eggshell fragments) rather than active plant life. The intervention of a spoon suggests an attempt to manipulate the soil, but no growth has occurred. The biome is currently in a state of total systemic loss.
